backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that stores and retrieves pattern configurations and signal history entries (capped at 50 each), with all endpoints gated behind access-control permission checks.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping the buy/sell signal marker overlay feature to its relevant source files, components, and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'Candle King Indicator' that mounts the React app via a root div and a module script pointing to src/main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that orchestrates live market data polling, runs the full candlestick analysis pipeline (patterns, EMAs, S/R, signals, signal markers), and passes results down to all dashboard sub-components.
frontend/src/components/CandlestickChart: Canvas-based interactive candlestick chart component that renders OHLC candles, EMA lines, S/R zones, and buy/sell signal marker arrows with labels, supporting pan and zoom via mouse events.
Structural layout component that arranges the header, ticker, data input, chart area, signal panel, history panel, and footer into a full-screen trading dashboard grid.
frontend/src/components/DataInputPanel.t: A collapsible panel component that allows users to load OHLC trading data via CSV paste, demo data, or live mode with symbol/timeframe selectors. Includes CSV parsing with validation and integrates live mode controls with status indicators.
Displays a real-time price ticker bar for a given symbol using Binance data, showing last price, 24h change, high/low, and volume with flash animations on price changes.
frontend/src/components/LiveStatusIndica: A small indicator component that shows a pulsing green 'LIVE'/'SYNCING' dot or a red 'ERROR' dot based on live data connection state.
frontend/src/components/LiveSymbolSelect: A dropdown selector component for choosing a live trading symbol (e.g. BTC/USDT) from a predefined list of Binance USDT pairs.
frontend/src/components/SignalDisplay.ts: Renders the final trading signal (BUY/SELL/NEUTRAL) with a confidence meter, TBC flag, dominant pattern label, and a list of confirmation signals with directional badges.
frontend/src/components/SignalHistoryPan: Displays a scrollable list of recently saved trading signals fetched from the backend, showing symbol, timeframe, pattern, signal type, confidence, and timestamp for each entry.
frontend/src/components/VolumeChart.tsx: A canvas-based volume bar chart that renders OHLC volume data with spike highlighting, synchronized to the main chart's pan/zoom state via a custom DOM event.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality, persisting identity across page reloads via AuthClient and exposing status flags through a React context hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useLiveMarketData.ts: Fetches and periodically refetches live OHLC candlestick data from Binance for a given symbol and timeframe using React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and saving signal history records via the ICP backend actor, including recent history, full history, and a save mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useTickerData.ts: Fetches and periodically refetches 24-hour ticker data for a given symbol from Binance using React Query.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global CSS using Tailwind with a dark trading-themed design system, including OKLCH color tokens for gold, bull/bear colors, surfaces, and custom utility classes.
Implements advanced candlestick confirmation signal detectors including MMC (liquidity sweep), After Effect (post-breakout retest), and Ellipse (tight consolidation/compression) patterns.
frontend/src/lib/candlestick-patterns.ts: Implements detection functions for common candlestick patterns (Doji, Hammer, Shooting Star, Bullish/Bearish Engulfing, Morning Star, etc.) returning typed pattern signals with confidence scores.
frontend/src/lib/demo-data.ts: Exports 60 hardcoded BTC/USDT 1H OHLCV candles with embedded candlestick patterns (e.g., Hammer, Doji, Engulfing) for demo/testing purposes.
frontend/src/lib/signal-aggregator.ts: Aggregates candlestick pattern signals, trend, S/R proximity, volume, and advanced confirmations into a weighted FinalSignal with confidence score and BUY/SELL/NEUTRAL classification.
frontend/src/lib/support-resistance.ts: Detects support and resistance zones from swing highs/lows, round number levels, and session extremes, and provides a proximity check for a given price.
frontend/src/lib/timeframe-mapper.ts: Maps app-specific timeframe labels (e.g., '1H', '4H', 'Daily') to Binance API interval strings, with a fallback to '1h'.
frontend/src/lib/trend-analysis.ts: Calculates EMA-20/50/200 values and determines trend direction (UP/DOWN/SIDEWAYS) using EMA alignment and higher-high/lower-low price structure analysis.
frontend/src/lib/volume-analysis.ts: Provides volume analysis utilities including average volume calculation, spike detection, confirmation checks, and low-volume warnings for candle arrays.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with React Query and Internet Identity authentication providers.
frontend/src/services/binance-api.ts: Fetches OHLCV kline data and 24-hour ticker statistics from the Binance public REST API without requiring an API key.
frontend/src/types/trading.ts: Defines core TypeScript interfaces and types for the trading module, including OHLCCandle, PatternSignal, FinalSignal, SupportResistanceZone, EMAData, and SignalMarker.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens (gold, bull, bear, surface, sidebar, chart), custom fonts (Inter, JetBrains Mono), and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file describing a 'Candle King' trading indicator app with versioned feature list, architectural notes, and known issues; covers candlestick pattern detection, trend/volume analysis, S/R zones, composite signal aggregation, and live Binance WebSocket data integration.
